title: Extra Select Premium Floating Swan and Duck Feed, 5 Litre (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Excellent supplement for all Ducks, Swans, Waterfowl, Cranes and Softbills.
Feed as a maintenance and breeding diet.
High levels of fish meal and shrimp as a replacement for the natural diet.
Customer may receive the box of 1.9kg variant/2.0kg 1.9kg variant
description: Indications Protein 19%, Fats & Oils 4%, Fibres 2.5%, Ash 7.5%, Calcium 1.8%, Phosphorus 0.87%, Moisture 13.8% Ingredients Ingredients: Wheat, Maize, Salmon Meal, Peas, Sunflower Seed Meal, Whole Linseed, Prairie Meal, Vitamins, Minerals and Trace Elements. Analytical Constituents: Crude Protein: 16% Crude Fats & Oils: 4% Crude Fibres: 3.8% Crude Ash: 6.2% Moisture: 9% Directions Suitable for all native waterfowl, scatter on water and feed as required. This is a complementary food that should be fed ad lib. See more

specifications_table.Allergen Information: ‎Crustaceans may contain, Gluten may contain, Soy may contain, Wheat may contain
specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎To be stored in a cool, dry place and sealed after opening.
specifications_table.Special features: ‎Floating feed, premium ingredients, wide species suitability
